message:
build(deps): add flate2 for gzip compression in history export

SUMMARY
=======
Adds the flate2 crate as a dependency to enable gzip compression
support for the history export feature.

DEPENDENCY DETAILS
==================
- Crate: flate2 1.0
- Purpose: Gzip compression for `dcg history export --compress`
- License: MIT/Apache-2.0 (compatible with DCG's MIT license)

USAGE
=====
When exporting history data, users can now compress output:

  dcg history export -o commands.json.gz --compress

This is particularly useful for large history databases where
the export file size can be significant. Compression typically
achieves 10-20x size reduction for command history data due to
high repetition in command patterns.

RELATED COMMIT
==============
This dependency supports the export compression feature added in:
  feat(history): Complete command history system with stats, export, and pack analysis

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -65,6 +65,7 @@ hmac = "0.12"  # HMAC for optional short-code hardening (ksk.1.10)
 fs2 = "0.4"
 rusqlite = { version = "0.35", features = ["bundled"] }  # Telemetry database
 ctrlc = "3.5.1"
+flate2 = "1.0"  # Gzip compression for history export
 
 [build-dependencies]
 vergen-gix = { version = "1.0", features = ["build", "cargo", "rustc"] }
